name: Amazon S3
description: Store files in S3 buckets. This official AWS MCP integration is installable through Cline.

env.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
env.description: AWS access key for S3 access.

env.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
env.description: AWS secret access key for S3 access.

env.name: AWS_REGION
env.description: AWS region for the target S3 resources.

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: stdio via uvx/docker; remote AWS Knowledge MCP also listed. Auth from source catalog: AWS credentials/IAM; server-specific env vars. Official AWS Labs MCP repository includes AWS API MCP for all AWS services and AWS S3 Tables MCP Server for S3 Tables.
